title: Make secure CoAP state publication atomic
description: Recover exactly-once token correlation and TOFU-before-context publication in Python secure CoAP. Separate inbound/outbound token namespaces, preserve valid correlations on authentication/send failure, retire final response correlations only after successful delivery, and never replace context/trust state when pinning rejects a key.
acceptance_criteria: Opposite-direction equal tokens do not collide; forged/failed responses do not consume valid correlation; successful final responses consume exactly once; failed sends leave no orphan outbound correlation; TOFU mismatch publishes no replacement context; focused tests, Ruff, mypy, and three reviews pass.
notes: Paused by user scope correction. Current uncommitted implementation in lichen-mainline-integration expanded beyond checkpoint recovery into new secure-CoAP lifecycle hardening. Preserve it untouched; do not commit or discard. Resume later under .65/.66 and review findings. Lost-work recovery continues in a fresh clean worktree from 40dcb4c2f.
